title: Lamella Clarifier Municipal Sewage Treatment Plant
summary: A highly efficient clarification system equipped with dense inclined tube fillers that precipitate suspended impurities from water. It is used across mining, metal finishing, and industrial wastewater treatment applications where solids loading is variable.
bullets: Efficient purification with stable Grade 1A effluent
Compact design for above-ground or underground installation
Fully automatic operation for stable performance

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Carbon steel with epoxy resin, fiberglass coating, or SS304
